_meta.title: Collect Payment — charge against existing PaymentMethod
_meta.description: Opened from the invoice canvas or card. RCA has NO capture API — this modal calls a customer-supplied Apex REST endpoint that wraps the Payment Gateway Adapter (Stripe/Adyen/Payeezy). Gap is disclosed inline.
_meta.rca_endpoint: Custom Apex REST → Payment Gateway Adapter; then POST /commerce/billing/payments/{paymentId}/actions/apply

elements.text: :receipt: *Invoice INV-9012* · Acme Corp · Posted Apr 16, 2026 · Due May 16

hint.text: Tokenized methods on file for Acme. New methods are added in Salesforce.

text.text:
*On file for Acme Corp:*
:credit_card:  Visa ending *4242* — default
:credit_card:  Amex ending *0005*
:bank:  ACH — Wells Fargo *...8821*
:receipt:  Wire instructions on file

hint.text: Defaults to full balance. Partial payments allowed.

placeholder.text: e.g. Confirmed over phone with Sarah Okonkwo at 2:15pm

elements.text: :lock: *Security.* RevFlow never stores card data. The `Charge` button calls your Salesforce Payment Gateway Adapter (configured per tenant). PCI-DSS scope stays in Salesforce.

:warning:  *Gap disclosure.* Revenue Cloud Advanced has no REST API for capturing funds. This action uses a customer-supplied Apex REST endpoint wrapping the Payment Gateway Adapter, then calls `/commerce/billing/payments/{id}/actions/apply` to allocate.
:sparkles: *RevFlow AI* — Acme's average days-to-pay is 18. A 2% early-pay discount is rare for them; if you're trying to pull cash forward this quarter, this is a reliable lever.
